description: Runs user-defined hook scripts before Claude Code compacts conversation history. Enables context preservation, transcript backup, and handover documentation before context loss.

baseline_observations.without_feature: Context compaction occurs silently. SessionStart hook re-injects standing rules but prior conversation context is lost. No transcript backup mechanism.
baseline_observations.expected_with_feature: PreCompact hook fires before compaction, allowing scripts to archive transcript, emit a bus SITREP, or save working state. Complements existing SessionStart re-injection.
baseline_observations.notes: Hook system is already wired (7 hooks active). PreCompact is an additional event type in the same framework. Low integration risk.
